_publications._publicationTitle: Testing ATRA and MEK inhibitor PD0325901 effectiveness in a nude mouse model for human MPNST xenografts.

_contextSnippet: Transplantation of S462 cells resulted in complete tumor development in all Foxn1 mice (4/4), and all tumors reached volumes > 70 mm³ 48 days after transplantation
details: S462 cells resulted in complete tumor development (4/4 tumors), all reaching volumes >70 mm³ at 48 days post-transplantation
